programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Get Up
programme.desc: ESPN's morning show features host Mike Greenberg with a rotating and diverse group of analysts opining about and analyzing the latest news from the world of sports. The two-hour, personality-driven show originates from Hudson Square in Lower Manhattan, a modern media hub for ESPN and The Walt Disney Company's New York-based teams. Greenberg, aka "Greeny," is formerly one-half of ESPN Radio's longt

programme.title: Live: First Take
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith hosts this weekday morning sports debate show. Smith provides his expert takes on the day's trending sports topics and under-the-radar news. They're regularly joined by veteran analysts and the top guests in sports and entertainment.

programme.title: Live: The Pat McAfee Show
programme.desc: Former NFL punter Pat McAfee brings his humor and candor to the microphone to highlight the day's top stories.

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 14 Tigers (5-0, 1-0 SEC) brace for the No. 8 Crimson Tide (4-1, 2-0). Alabama has won four in a row after prevailing 30-14 over Vanderbilt on Oct. 4, and is 5-0 versus Missouri since 2012. Mizzou is 5-0 for the second time in three years.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 6 Crimson Tide seek a sixth straight win when they host the No. 11 Volunteers. Last season, Tennessee beat Alabama for the second time in its last 18 attempts, as Chris Brazzell II caught the go-ahead TD pass in a 24-17 decision.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 4 Crimson Tide bring a full head of steam into this match with the Gamecocks. Alabama has won six in a row, with the past four victories coming over ranked opponents after a 37-20 verdict against then-No. 11 Tennessee on Oct. 18.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Tigers (5-3, 2-3 SEC) try to put a tumultuous period behind them as they visit the No. 4 Crimson Tide (7-1, 5-0). LSU dismissed head coach Brian Kelly and athletic director Scott Woodward in the days following a 49-25 loss to Texas A&M.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 11 Sooners (7-2, 3-2 SEC) visit the No. 4 Crimson Tide (8-1, 6-0) in this marquee matchup. Alabama has won eight straight after burying LSU, 20-9 out of its bye Nov. 8. Oklahoma shocked then-No. 14 Tennessee 33-27 before its week off Nov. 1.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: SEC rivals in the No. 10 Crimson Tide (9-2, 6-1) and Tigers (5-6, 1-6) meet in the Iron Bowl. Alabama leads the series 51-37-1. The Crimson Tide will earn a berth in the SEC championship game if they beat the Tigers for the sixth straight time.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by SMU Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 SMU Mustangs.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: Original content and storytelling that focuses on student-athlete features from a variety of the conference's 27 varsity sports.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 9 Crimson Tide (10-2) and No. 3 Bulldogs (11-1) meet in the SEC championship game for the third time in five years. Alabama is 4-0 against Georgia in SEC title contests. The Bulldogs yielded a total of 22 points in the last three outings.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Roadrunners face the No. 19 Aggies at Kyle Field. UTSA won a postseason game for a second straight year in 2024, thrashing Coastal Carolina 44-15 in the Myrtle Beach Bowl. Texas A&M went 8-5 in its first year under the supervision of Mike Elko.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: No. 19 Texas A&M, led by sophomore quarterback Marcel Reed, welcomes Utah State to Kyle Field for an all-Aggies affair. Reed passed for 289 yards and a career-high four touchdowns in a 42-24 victory over UTSA in Week 1. Utah State topped UTEP 28-16.

programme.desc: Mike fishes in Captiva Fl with local legend Ozzie Fischer. When you're with Ozzie... everyone wins!

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: John Bergsma showcases fishing hot spots in the Great Lakes region.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Legends of the Fall is produced with truly die-hard deer hunters in mind. Legends of the Fall chronicles the high-energy hunts and behind-the-scenes action of a dedicated crew of passionate hunters. While the show spotlights a dynamic variety of adrenaline-pumping whitetail bow hunts across North America, it also offers a mix of other big game adventures. Each episode details the lives of all clan

programme.title: Big Deer TV
programme.desc: Big Deer Producer Justin Karnopp returns to his Oregon roots.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Chef and the crew continue to explore northeast Louisiana hunting Canada geese on the Mississippi River and look to make a meat haul with some whitetail does.

programme.title: Bob Redfern's Outdoor Magazine
programme.desc: Smallmouth bass fishing on the Niagara River with guide Frank Campbell.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Bruce Pettet leads a fifth-generation family company on an unrelenting mission to make the best optics in America.

programme.title: Whitetail Properties
programme.desc: You would feed them if you could, wouldn't you? Some states allow the blessing in disguise of what some consider less than ideal.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: John McClane (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building and must shoot through the glass window to break through to safety; reconstructing the scene using the same Beretta 92 handgun and office glass.

programme.title: Handguns
programme.desc: Malfunction clearing and reloading must become second nature so you can focus on the assailant.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather and Mike will demonstrate the cultural importance of Náxw, the traditional wooden halibut hooks used by Tlingit people for centuries.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: The Award-Winning Heartland Waterfowl is a team of men from the Midwest that travels across the US and Canada to film honest waterfowl hunting experiences. With a variety of personalities, these hunting buddies pursue waterfowl hunting with hard work and a dedication to scouting, while showcasing their efforts with the highest standard of production quality.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: In one of the harshest environments on the planet, Mario Kalpou travels to the outback desert of Australia in search of feral camels that have been running rampant.

programme.title: Whitetail Fix
programme.desc: Thanks be to God, after a handful of encounters, Ernie finally closes the chapter on a Michigan bully-buck rightly coined Tank.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Join the Slock Master for an action-packed voyage into the past where primitive hunting is relived by the world's most recognized authority in spear and blowgun hunting. Laugh or cry, Tim Wells delivers every time.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original—an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken—his skills extend far beyond

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve's friends Janis and Papa Janis join him on a moose and caribou hunt in east-central Alaska that's the fulfillment of a lifelong dream.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: After early success on their moose and caribou hunt in Alaska, wild game has eluded Steve's party so he and Janis decide it's time to take action.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: Hiking up the Himalayan mountains on a challenging sheep hunt.

programme.title: Crossroads With the Burtons

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join host Roger Raglin for one exciting whitetail adventure after another. Roger Raglin Outdoors features all big game but is predominantly whitetail hunting utilizing a variety of hunting methods: bow, rifle and black powder. As a true outdoorsman and an exceptional big game hunter, Roger shares a lifetime of tricks and techniques to help you in your quest for big game.

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: We go back in time, where people are friendly and truly still love their neighbor, history is cherished, and Queen Elizabeth reigns supreme. St Helena Island is a true gem dropped into the Atlantic somewhere between Brazil and Africa, join us, as we meet the Atlantic Saints.
